name: Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd. produces and sells electronic chemicals, chemical reagents, and other specialty chemicals in China. The company offers copper nitrate, copper carbonate basic, cupric pyrophosphate, copper oxide, copper chloride, copper sulfate pentahydrate, nickel carbonate basic, nickel acetate, nickel chloride hexahydrat, nickel sulfamate solution, nickel sulfate hexahydrate, tin sulfate, sodium stannate trihydrate, potassium stannate trihydrate, tin chloride dihydrate, tin methanesulfonate solution, cobalt sulfamate solution, cobalt sulfate, cobalt acetate, cobalt nitrate, cobalt chloride, and potassium pyrophosphate. It also provides nickel sulfate, manganese sulfate monohydrate, cobalt sulfate, ternary precursor, lithium iron phosphate, lithium manganese iron phosphate, and ironic phosphate; plating additives; pcb solutions; oxide/peroxidate, inorganic acid, etc.; salts of organic acids, hydrocarbon/ substituted hydrocarbons, alcohol/ phenol/ether/ketone, nitrile/amine/urea, etc.; and biochemical reagent, chromatographic reagent, pH and redox indicator, photochemistry and electrochemical analysis reagent, etc. The company serves printed circuit board, energy materials, auto parts, electronic components, medicine, chemical, bathroom hardware, research and development, and e-commerce industries. It exports its products to Southeast Asia, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Shantou Guanghua Chemical Factory Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd. in 2010. Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.
